title: In Form, skip to specific question based on answer
excerpt:
Similar to MS Forms, I’d like to have the ability to skip to a specific question based on the response. For example: 
Q: Did you complete your TPS report? 
A: Yes (go to next question) 
A: No (go to question #6)

posts.author: mweekend (Matthew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Similar to MS Forms, I’d like to have the ability to skip to a specific question based on the response. For example:
Q: Did you complete your TPS report?
A: Yes (go to next question)
A: No (go to question #6)
